response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:44: Identified song '不可思議のカルテ' from on-screen text. Detected performers as Otonose Kanade and Ichijou Ririka based on costume and birthday celebration context (#音乃瀬奏生誕祭2026). Searched for original lyrics and English translation. 2. 02:44-05:00: Identified as conversational/banter segment. 3. Compiled lyrics and metadata for the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Otonose Kanade and Ichijou Ririka performing a vocal cover of 'Fukashigi no Karte' (the ending theme of 'Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai'), followed by a post-performance conversational segment to the audience.

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade and Ichijou Ririka perform a cover of the song 'Fukashigi no Karte'. Visuals feature the VTubers on a virtual stage with concert lighting.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I can't talk, I can't sleep, traumerei
The true character you are seeing
Is a chart that no one can read
I just want to know wonder
Both lies and reality
Both of them were true in the end
Today as well, I'm all alone
Don't push yourself to do anything, I just want to be loved
A pitiful goodbye, I feel a light dizziness
This is a phenomenal world without you
A chart that no one can read
And an overflowing self-consciousness
Beating, world image
It's always a bit off, it hurts
Every night I wish
I don't want to doubt anything, and I want to melt together
Silly, I don't know, reasoning, existing
Regret that we leave together
A record that no one can read
Unpleasant, repeating
What's the right dream? Why are there sad voices?
It's beautiful? Doubtful? Jealous?
Hey, which one?
I can't talk, I can't sleep, traumerei
The true character you are seeing

I just want to know wonder
There is an end

A record that no one can read
Adolescent, wound, inside of heart

scenes.description: The vocal performance ends. Otonose Kanade and Ichijou Ririka talk to the audience, introducing themselves, discussing their recent collaboration, and bantering as part of Otonose Kanade's birthday event.
